message:
style: formatting cleanup in codec, rwlock, and happy eyeballs

Minor code style improvements with no behavioral changes:

- codec/lines.rs: remove unreachable continue in discard-overflow
  branch, reformat String::from_utf8 call chains for line wrapping
- sync/rwlock.rs: reformat if-expression blocks in writer-release
  and WriteFuture/OwnedWriteFuture drop impls for consistent indentation
- net/happy_eyeballs.rs: refactor sort_socket_addrs to use method
  references (SocketAddr::is_ipv6), reformat test assertions, add
  connect_uses_per_address_ports test for port preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
